description.value:
Prerequisite: Any 1 meta-Chakra feat, Con 13.

Benefit: When applied to a Chakra Control or Ninjutsu technique used on yourself, you gain a +4 deflection bonus to Defense for 1 round. The technique's Perform Requirements increase by 2, and the Chakra Cost increases by 1 for every 2 Ranks of the technique (rounded up).

Special: A technique enhanced by this feat cannot be enhanced by other meta-Chakra feats.
